questions.question: Barapani Lake of Shillong is also known as ________.
Volcanoes are often found in which type of plate boundary?
Which range is known for its rich biodiversity and is a UNESCO World Heritage Site?
Which of the following rivers is associated with National Waterway 10 (NW-10)?
Which of the following best explains why the Lakshadweep Islands have low biodiversity compared to the Andaman and Nicobar Islands?
questions.option_4: Smaller land area and absence of forests

questions.question: Which Indian state had the largest coal reserve in the fiscal year 2023-24, as per the Ministry of Coal data?

The location of cement plants is mainly governed by the availability of:

How does the use of renewable energy contribute to sustainable development?
questions.option_1: It increases dependency on fossil fuels.
questions.option_3: It reduces environmental pollution and conserves resources.
questions.option_4: It provides unlimited profits to energy companies.

questions.question: Which of the following continents is located entirely in the Southern Hemisphere?

questions.option_1: Wider and formed by alluvial deposits
questions.option_4: Located between the Western Ghats and the Arabian Sea
